name: Gatos Silver, Inc.
description: Gatos Silver, Inc. is a silver-dominant exploration, development, and production company that focuses on the production of silver, zinc, and lead. The company's primary asset is its 70% interest in the Los Gatos Joint Venture, which owns the Cerro Los Gatos mine located in Chihuahua, Mexico. Gatos Silver is dedicated to identifying, characterizing, and developing world-class mineral districts, with a strong commitment to sustainable and responsible mining practices.
